category_sources: Official site and repository describe watchexec as a tool that watches paths and runs commands on modifications.
source_facts.description says watchexec executes commands when watched files change.
display_name_sources: Official homepage and repository use the watchexec name.
docs_sources: Official watchexec website provides a dedicated /docs/ documentation path.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/watchexec/watchexec; per instruction, repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: Official repository documents watchexec as a standalone file-watching command runner; source_facts package metadata identifies the CLI executable.
source_facts.description identifies command execution on file changes.
